windows.old_description: Rolling a yellow honeycomb beeswax sheet around a wick to form a candle.

seconds_v2.desc: Title-card scene: three lit candles on a rustic wooden windowsill (a taper in a black holder, a small candle in a bowl, and one in a dark mug) backlit by a snowy cabin view through a railing window.
Same windowsill scene; faded overlay title text begins to appear reading 'How To Make' across the snowy window background.
Overlay title now fully visible in large letters: 'HOW TO MAKE ROLLED BEESWAX CANDLES' over the three lit candles and snowy view.
Static intro shot with the burned-in title 'HOW TO MAKE ROLLED BEESWAX CANDLES'; three candle flames flicker on the wooden sill, snow outside.
Unchanged title card; the three candles continue to burn against the wintry window backdrop with the overlay text held.
Title overlay still displayed over the candlelit windowsill; gentle flicker of the taper, bowl candle, and mug candle flames.
Continued intro title scene, 'HOW TO MAKE ROLLED BEESWAX CANDLES' overlaid on the three lit candles and snowy cabin railing.
The overlay title begins to fade out; three candles still burning on the rustic wooden sill before the snowy window.
